description: Showcase your big seasonal discounts with this neon Cyber Monday email. The animated headline will surely catch your customers’ attention along with the product images and descriptions that you display. Customize the template with your brand colors, icons and fonts and be sure to make use of the clear CTAs. This cyber monday email is free to edit and use for any big sale you have to offer.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
